title: Embassy Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Embassy Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!
